recommended_internal_model_name: Zoning + Transportation + Tax/Value Internal Ranking Variant
reasons_for_selection: Phase 16C ablation found the tax/value-only addition improved PR-AUC from 0.082744 to 0.137928 versus the transportation-enhanced base.
The tax/value-only addition improved lift@top 5% from 3.889837 to 4.051123 versus the transportation-enhanced base.
The full Phase 16B feature bundle reduced PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, so it is not recommended as the current internal ranking variant.
The selected variant preserves zoning and transportation context while excluding noisy or proxy-only Phase 16B feature groups.

excluded_feature_group_reasons.Accela plan reviews: Current-context and pipeline/status semantics need temporal and jurisdiction QA; ablation improved PR-AUC slightly but hurt top-k lift substantially.
excluded_feature_group_reasons.Central Area Plan: Concord-only current-context plan coverage is useful context but not countywide enough for the current best model.
excluded_feature_group_reasons.utility proxy: Proxy-only service context is not true water/sewer capacity and did not improve top-k ranking enough to include.
excluded_feature_group_reasons.metadata/current-context flags: Governance flags document caveats and should not act as predictive drivers.

next_data_needed: official rezoning case dates and old/new zoning decisions
countywide adopted future land use with effective dates
true utility capacity and allocation data
official development pipeline/subdivision approvals with dates and outcomes
verified school capacity and enrollment data
